← Ontology

🪴 Venture_Cultivation

Parent item
33314415-10e1-81f8-b907-c26c1bc7f8f6
long_description
Investable regenerative enterprises rarely spring fully formed; they need cohorts, mentorship, storytelling, and ecosystem support to mature. Cultivation is the patient work of building enterprises and pipelines that match bioregional ambition with what capital can recognize.
slug
Venture_Cultivation
Activities
33314415-10e1-8102-9cd3-f85663979688, 33314415-10e1-81b9-8f70-eeb7137b10a8, 33314415-10e1-8186-b2f6-e3a243bf4935, 33314415-10e1-8106-9dc9-e969d8b67021, 33314415-10e1-8175-8f1a-d95adcc1e4bb, 33314415-10e1-814d-9397-ddff63e7315c, 33314415-10e1-8122-99cb-c36f6096cc2a, 33314415-10e1-81f5-aa04-e95e141a86de, 33314415-10e1-813e-a90e-c4e4d26d3ded
Description
Programs and organizations that develop investable, place‑rooted enterprises and prepare them for funding—through cohort‑based support, training, mentorship, storytelling, and ecosystem‑building. These may include venture studios that create aligned regenerative projects to drive systems change and generate dealflow.
parent_pattern_name
Systemic Finance
sort_order
3
